strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience building agentic workflows and AI infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators.
Strong backend and distributed systems background with real-time, high-throughput systems from Optilyz and Dunnhumby.
Proven track record of open-source leadership and technical mentorship through GISCollective and workshops on testing, web internals, and TDD.
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent active technical engagement and leadership continuity.
Lacks explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or managing hybrid external engineering models.
No clear demonstration of production-scale multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments or financial risk modeling.
response.justification: The candidate brings strong technical depth in distributed systems, real-time infrastructure, and emerging agentic frameworks, with notable open-source and mentorship contributions, but lacks demonstrated experience in regulated fintech environments and scaling senior engineering teams — critical gaps for this executive role.
